text:
Marginal Citations


M4 Section 47 was inserted by section 1 of the Forced Marriage (Civil Protection) Act 2007.


### [ F46 Enforcement of orders and undertakings E+W


11.15. — (1) At the time when the order is drawn up, the court officer will, where the order made is (or includes) a F47 ... protection order, issue a copy of the order, endorsed with or incorporating a notice as to the consequences of disobedience, for service in accordance with rule 11.7.


(2) F48 ... Part 37 applies F49 ... where an application is made to commit a person for breach of an undertaking.


[ F50 (Rule 37.4(2) includes requirements for the information to be contained in a contempt application in relation to breach of an order or an undertaking.) ] .) ]


Textual Amendments


F46 Rule 11.15 substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 16 (with rule 45 )


F47 Words in rule 11.15(1) omitted (17.7.2015) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2015 (S.I. 2015/1420) , rules 1(2) , 16(a)


F48 Words in rule 11.15(2) omitted (1.10.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/758) , rules 1(1) , 4(a)(i)


F49 Words in rule 11.15(2) omitted (1.10.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/758) , rules 1(1) , 4(a)(ii)


F50 Words in rule 11.15 substituted (1.10.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/758) , rules 1(1) , 4(b)


### Power to adjourn the hearing for consideration of the penalty E+W

metadata.title: Part 11 — Applications under Part 4A of the Family Law Act 1996 or Part 1 of Schedule 2 to the Female Genital Mutilation Act 2003
